title: trasus pilulifer
intro: Trasus pilulifer is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, headache, and digestive issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Trasus pilulifer include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, Trasus pilulifer is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and treat various health conditions.
